text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Kikuka Sho, one of three races
of the much-coveted Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowds at the racecourse are all eager to see
the Mejiro family showdown that is to soon take
place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen boldly braces herself for the
sincere contest she promised to provide Mejiro
Ryan. Both will hold nothing back in order to win.
